Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-4046 affecting package glibc for versions less than 2.38-20
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-4046 affecting package glibc for versions less than 2.38-20. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package glibc is earlier than 2.38-20, affected by CVE-2026-4046
